constraints.layout_style: fieldset stacks with legend-only section titles

required_complexity_patterns.notes: Multiple controls sharing name attribute groups (checkbox/radio clusters)
Label wraps input through nested divs without for attribute
At least two fields with aria-label only and no visible label element
Field labeled via aria-labelledby pointing at hidden or distant span
Fields inside details/summary or hidden until click

reference_templates.title: Search type for name
reference_templates.notes: Name field uses input type=search instead of text
reference_templates.dom_excerpt: Search type name

reference_templates.title: Deep wrapped label
reference_templates.notes: Label without for wraps input three div levels deep
reference_templates.dom_excerpt: Deep wrapped label

reference_templates.title: CSS hidden wizard steps
reference_templates.notes: Multi-step wizard with only one step visible via CSS class toggling
reference_templates.dom_excerpt:
Wizard steps

<

prompt_summary: Create a messy, production-real ashby-style job application (single-page, small, tier=high). Widgets: combobox. Required: Multiple controls sharing name attribute groups (checkbox/radio clusters) Required: Label wraps input through nested divs without for attribute Required: At least two fields with aria-label only and no visible label element Required: Field labeled via aria-labelledby pointing at hidden or distant span Required: Fields inside details/summary or hidden until click Reference DOM (Search type for name): Name field uses input type=search instead of text Reference DOM (Deep wrapped label): Label without for wraps input three div levels deep Reference DOM (CSS hidden wizard steps): Multi-step wizard with only one step visible via CSS class toggling Do NOT produce a tutorial-style form where every field is label[for]+native input. Mix native controls with non-semantic production DOM from the patterns below. Implement ALL required complexity patterns: duplicate-name-attrs, label-wraps-deep, aria-label-only, aria-labelledby-hidden, details-accordion. Include at least one custom widget (div role=textbox, pill buttons, or listbox combobox). Include at least one labeling strategy besides label-for (aria-label, aria-labelledby, glued spans, placeholder-only). Layout: fieldset stacks with legend-only section titles. Avoid generic centered SaaS card as the only structure. High tier: include shadow DOM host OR iframe apply shell OR wizard/conditional reveal with hidden fields. Mirror structural messiness like these references: Search type for name; Deep wrapped label; CSS hidden wizard steps.
